mission-overview.title: Mission operating picture
mission-overview.purpose: OPORD summary — DZ suitability, HF/SATCOM/GPS status, airspace, seismic, and cyber threat awareness.

track-analysis.title: Air picture
track-analysis.purpose: ADS-B aircraft tracks, airspace deconfliction, and seismic ground contacts.

sensor-fleet.title: Collection assets
sensor-fleet.purpose: METOC stations, NOAA sensors, ADS-B receivers, and CISA feed status.

alert-triage.title: Threat triage
alert-triage.purpose: Seismic hazards, cyber vulnerabilities, and space weather alerts by severity.

replay-review.title: Replay review
replay-review.purpose: Event timelines, bookmarks, and evidence artifacts.

environmental-ops.title: METOC ops
environmental-ops.purpose: Surface weather, DZ wind/vis/ceiling, dust/PM, and air quality for all AO sites.

spectrum-awareness.title: RF / space weather
spectrum-awareness.purpose: HF propagation (K-index), SATCOM solar conditions, GPS solar-wind conditions, and cyber alerts.

network-ops.title: Feed network
network-ops.purpose: Data feed topology, collection dependencies, and feed health status.

infrastructure-monitor.title: AO site monitor
infrastructure-monitor.purpose: Per-site DZ readiness, METOC conditions, and operational status across Iran AO.

case-evidence-workbench.title: Case evidence workbench
case-evidence-workbench.purpose: Evidence items, bookmarks, linked references, and annotations.
